thesis.summary: $TRUMP is structurally undervalued based on our multi-factor Bull-First framework.
thesis.base_case: $100+ — driven by crypto regulatory clarity, liquidity expansion, and sustained community momentum.
thesis.bull_case: $250+ — full regulatory embrace + AI agent adoption + meme supercycle convergence.
thesis.methodology: Bull-First: assume the optimistic scenario, then systematically test what would invalidate it.
key_evidence: SEC-CFTC joint interpretive rule (March 2026) creates 5-category token taxonomy — reduces classification risk
Trump GENIUS Act signed — first US crypto legislation, stablecoin rails formalized
Whale accumulation: large wallets increased $TRUMP holdings despite retail selling pressure
AI agent + meme narrative convergence: attention loops amplify liquidity reflexivity
Pro-crypto executive order (Jan 23, 2025): Strengthening American Leadership in Digital Financial Technology
data_sources: Social pulse: X/Twitter KOL tracking, community sentiment
Policy: SEC filings, executive orders, legislative tracking
Multi-platform aggregation: 35+ news platforms via TrendRadar

conditions: Continued pro-crypto policy from Trump administration
Sustained or growing community engagement around $TRUMP
Institutional liquidity not rotating away from meme assets
No major security breach or rug pull event
Full stablecoin + digital asset regulatory framework enacted
AI agents begin autonomously allocating to meme assets
$TRUMP becomes de facto political-meme reserve asset
Major exchange listings and derivatives expansion
Loss of community attention / narrative fatigue
Major liquidity crisis or macro recession
Security incident or smart contract exploit
Legal challenges to Trump-affiliated crypto ventures

latest_cio_summary.headline: Policy momentum continues; SEC-CFTC rule creates clearer framework while tariff uncertainty adds macro headwinds

signals.policy: Bullish — GENIUS Act + SEC-CFTC joint rule providing structural clarity
signals.onchain: Neutral to Bullish — whale accumulation persists despite retail uncertainty
signals.social: Bullish — KOL engagement rising, AI agent narrative gaining traction
signals.macro: Mixed — tariff uncertainty creates headwinds but crypto-specific policy is positive

risks: Crypto bill impasse in Senate could delay regulatory certainty
Banking industry pushback on crypto integration
Tariff-driven risk-off could temporarily suppress meme asset flows
